sentences.translation: Svi su pili čaj nakon večere.

sentences.arabic: أَضَافَ بَعْضُهُمُ السُّكَّرَ وَبَعْضُهُمْ لَمْ يُضِفْ.
sentences.translation: Neki su dodali šećer a neki nisu.
sentences.translationEn: Some of them added sugar and some did not.

sentences.translation: Razgovarali su i smijali se oko stola.
sentences.translationEn: They talked and laughed around the table.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ وَقْتُ الشَّايِ هُوَ أَجْمَلُ وَقْتٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Čaj-vrijeme je bilo najljepše doba dana.
sentences.translationEn: Tea time was the most beautiful time of the day.
